title: Marcel's Green Diamonds
description: Changes all diamonds in game to a green hue, why not?
body:
### I made this texture pack a few years ago for personal use, but I decided to polish it up and make it look better so i can upload it here.

![Showcase of the texture pack](https://i.imgur.com/cFDlLt5.png)

The pack should work in versions past 1.21.1 assuming mojang dosent do what mojang does and rewrite how resource packs work.
